message:
refactor(scheduler): clean up three_lane execute method

- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to execute() which necessarily
  handles multiple phases of task execution
- Convert if-else to map_or_else for cancel waker cache handling,
  reducing nesting and making control flow clearer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
